title: CT3 automation-first Lean tactic
description: The complete compiled graph, general capability API, specialized capability profiles, node automation contracts, and semantic residual inventory for this tactic.

transitions.constructorType:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT3.Spec P} →
    {C : CT3.Capability S} →
      {input : CT3.Input S} → CT3.Graph.Edge S C input CT3.Graph.NodeId.entry CT3.Graph.NodeId.vectorComputation

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT3.Spec P} →
    {C : CT3.Capability S} →
      {input : CT3.Input S} →
        CT3.ExactVectorState S input →
          CT3.Graph.Edge S C input CT3.Graph.NodeId.vectorComputation CT3.Graph.NodeId.compressionSearch

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT3.Spec P} →
    {C : CT3.Capability S} →
      {input : CT3.Input S} →
        {vector : CT3.ExactVectorState S input} →
          CT3.CompressionCertificate S C input vector →
            CT3.Graph.Edge S C input CT3.Graph.NodeId.compressionSearch CT3.Graph.NodeId.compressionTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →

    {C : CT3.Capability S} →

        {vector : CT3.ExactVectorState S input} →

{P : Core.Problem} →

    {C : CT3.Capability S} →
      {input : CT3.Input S} →
        CT3.DistinguishingContextResidual S C input →
          CT3.Graph.Edge S C input CT3.Graph.NodeId.tableValidation CT3.Graph.NodeId.distinguishingTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT3.Spec P} →
    {C : CT3.Capability S} →
      {input : CT3.Input S} →
        CT3.ExactTableState S C → CT3.Graph.Edge S C input CT3.Graph.NodeId.tableValidation CT3.Graph.NodeId.rowLookup

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT3.Spec P} →
    {C : CT3.Capability S} →

semanticFields.leanType: S.response (S.rowPiece row) context ≠ S.rowResponse row context

presentation.plainExplanation: The type of local pieces whose external responses CT3 compares.
presentation.label: Boundaried piece

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT3.Spec P → Type uPiece
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Spec.Piece

presentation.plainExplanation: The type of outside contexts used as exact response coordinates.
presentation.label: Response context

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT3.Spec P → Type uContext
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Spec.Context

presentation.plainExplanation: The type of proposed representatives that may replace a source piece.
presentation.label: Compression candidate

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT3.Spec P → Type uCandidate
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Spec.Candidate

presentation.plainExplanation: The type of predeclared response rows used to classify a source piece.
presentation.label: Known response row

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT3.Spec P → Type uRow
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Spec.Row

presentation.plainExplanation: Computes the exact Boolean behavior of a piece in an outside context.
presentation.label: Exact response

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT3.Spec P) → self.Piece → self.Context → Bool
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Spec.response

presentation.plainExplanation: Interprets a compression candidate as the piece it represents.
presentation.label: Candidate interpretation

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT3.Spec P) → self.Candidate → self.Piece
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Spec.candidatePiece

presentation.plainExplanation: The proposition that candidate c is allowed to replace source piece p in G.
presentation.label: Candidate admissibility

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT3.Spec P) → P.Ambient → self.Piece → self.Candidate → Prop
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Spec.Admissible

presentation.plainExplanation: The proposition that candidate c gives a genuine size reduction for p in G.
presentation.label: Strictly smaller candidate

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT3.Spec P) → P.Ambient → self.Piece → self.Candidate → Prop
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Spec.Smaller

presentation.plainExplanation: Selects the canonical piece represented by a known response row.
presentation.label: Row representative

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT3.Spec P) → self.Row → self.Piece
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Spec.rowPiece

presentation.plainExplanation: Gives the declared exact response vector associated with a known row.
presentation.label: Row response

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT3.Spec P) → self.Row → self.Context → Bool
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Spec.rowResponse

presentation.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered enumeration of every response coordinate.
presentation.label: Finite context enumeration

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT3.Spec P} → CT3.Capability S → FinEnum S.Context
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Capability.contexts

presentation.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered enumeration of all compression candidates.
presentation.label: Finite candidate enumeration

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT3.Spec P} → CT3.Capability S → FinEnum S.Candidate
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Capability.candidates

presentation.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered enumeration of all known response rows.
presentation.label: Finite row enumeration

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT3.Spec P} → CT3.Capability S → FinEnum S.Row
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Capability.rows

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable evidence deciding whether a candidate is admissible.
presentation.label: Admissibility decision procedure

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT3.Spec P} →
    CT3.Capability S →
      (G : P.Ambient) → (source : S.Piece) → (candidate : S.Candidate) → Decidable (S.Admissible G source candidate)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Capability.admissibleDecidable

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable evidence deciding whether a candidate is strictly smaller.
presentation.label: Decrease decision procedure

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT3.Spec P} →
    CT3.Capability S →
      (G : P.Ambient) → (source : S.Piece) → (candidate : S.Candidate) → Decidable (S.Smaller G source candidate)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Capability.smallerDecidable

presentation.plainExplanation: The application-specific size measure used in CT3's complexity certificate.
presentation.label: Input size

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT3.Spec P} → CT3.Capability S → P.Ambient → ℕ
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Capability.inputSize

presentation.plainExplanation: The coefficient in the certified polynomial bound on CT3 checks.
presentation.label: Work coefficient

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT3.Spec P} → CT3.Capability S → ℕ
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Capability.workCoefficient

presentation.plainExplanation: The degree in the certified polynomial bound on CT3 checks.
presentation.label: Work degree

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT3.Spec P} → CT3.Capability S → ℕ
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Capability.workDegree

presentation.plainExplanation: A proof that the full context, candidate, and row schedule satisfies the declared bound.
presentation.label: Polynomial work bound

formalDeclaration.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {S : CT3.Spec P} (self : CT3.Capability S) (G : P.Ambient),
  CT3.localCheckBound self.contexts self.candidates self.rows ≤
    self.workCoefficient * (self.inputSize G + 1) ^ self.workDegree
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Capability.workBound

presentation.plainExplanation: The union of the mapped atom-side and outside-context edge sets.
presentation.label: Literal graph gluing

formalDeclaration.type:
{T : Type u} →
  FinEnum T → Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.Piece T → Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.Context T → Graph.PackedFiniteObject
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.glue

presentation.plainExplanation: The normalized outside context owns no boundary--boundary edge; the atom side owns those edges.
presentation.label: Boundary-edge ownership

formalDeclaration.type:
∀ {T : Type u} (self : Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.Context T) (left right : T),
  ¬self.graph.Adj (Sum.inl left) (Sum.inl right)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.Context.noBoundaryEdge

presentation.plainExplanation: A graph isomorphism identifying the literal gluing with the selected ambient graph.
presentation.label: Graph reconstruction

formalDeclaration.type:
{input : Graph.PackedMinimumDegreeCycle.StaticInput} →
  {T : Type u} →
    {boundaries : FinEnum T} →
      {ctx : Core.MinimalCounterexampleContext input.problem input.Target} →
        (self : Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.MinimumDegreeCycleReplacement.ProperAtom input boundaries ctx) →
          (Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.glue boundaries self.source self.outside).object.graph ≃g ctx.G.object.graph
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.MinimumDegreeCycleReplacement.ProperAtom.reconstruct

presentation.plainExplanation: The literal atom-side graph is connected.
presentation.label: Connected atom

formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.MinimumDegreeCycleReplacement.ProperAtom.connected

presentation.plainExplanation: The reconstructed atom is a proper local support of the ambient graph.
presentation.label: Proper atom

formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.MinimumDegreeCycleReplacement.ProperAtom.proper

presentation.plainExplanation: The replacement and source lie in the same boundary-degree fibre.
presentation.label: Boundary-degree equality

formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.MinimumDegreeCycleReplacement.Compression.boundaryDegree_eq

presentation.plainExplanation: Every replacement target response in an outside context transports to the source; two-way equivalence is not assumed.
presentation.label: Obstruction inclusion

formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.MinimumDegreeCycleReplacement.Compression.obstructionIncluded

presentation.plainExplanation: The replacement piece alone contains no selected target cycle.
presentation.label: Internal target avoidance

formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.MinimumDegreeCycleReplacement.Compression.internalTargetFree

presentation.plainExplanation: Every internal replacement vertex meets the minimum-degree threshold.
presentation.label: Replacement internal degree

formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.MinimumDegreeCycleReplacement.Compression.internalBaseline

presentation.plainExplanation: Only the replacement piece is assumed smaller; whole-graph decrease is derived.
presentation.label: Local lexicographic decrease

formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.MinimumDegreeCycleReplacement.Compression.locallySmaller

apiDeclarations.type: Type
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Graph.NodeId

apiDeclarations.type: CT3.Graph.NodeId → String
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Graph.NodeId.code

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT3.Spec P) → CT3.Capability S → CT3.Input S → CT3.Graph.NodeId → CT3.Graph.NodeId → Type (max (max u_2 u_3) u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Graph.Edge

apiDeclarations.type: Type
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Graph.Terminal

apiDeclarations.type: CT3.Graph.Terminal → CT3.Graph.NodeId
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Graph.Terminal.nodeId

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT3.Spec P) → CT3.Capability S → CT3.Input S → CT3.Graph.NodeId → CT3.Graph.NodeId → Type (max (max u_2 u_3) u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Graph.Path

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT3.Spec P} → {C : CT3.Capability S} → {input : CT3.Input S} → List CT3.Graph.NodeId → Prop
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Graph.ValidTrace

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT3.Spec P → Type (max (max (max (max uAmbient u_1) u_2) u_3) u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Capability

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT3.Spec P → Type (max (max uAmbient uBranch) u_1)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Input

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (S : CT3.Spec P) → CT3.Capability S → CT3.Input S → Type (max (max u_2 u_3) u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.ExecutionResult

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT3.Spec P) → CT3.Capability S → CT3.Input S → CT3.Graph.Terminal → Type (max (max u_2 u_3) u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.RawOutcome

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (S : CT3.Spec P) → (C : CT3.Capability S) → (input : CT3.Input S) → CT3.ExecutionResult S C input
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.run

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (S : CT3.Spec P) → (C : CT3.Capability S) → (input : CT3.Input S) → CT3.ExecutionResult S C input
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.runReference

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT3.Spec P) (C : CT3.Capability S) (input : CT3.Input S),
  CT3.OutcomeClaim (CT3.run S C input).outcome
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.run_verified

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT3.Spec P) (C : CT3.Capability S) (input : CT3.Input S),
  CT3.Graph.ValidTrace (CT3.run S C input).trace
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.run_trace_valid

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT3.Spec P) (C : CT3.Capability S) (input : CT3.Input S),
  ∃ result, CT3.OutcomeClaim result.outcome ∧ CT3.Graph.ValidTrace result.trace
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.run_total

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT3.Spec P) (C : CT3.Capability S) (input : CT3.Input S)
  (first second : CT3.ExecutionResult S C input),
  first = CT3.run S C input → second = CT3.run S C input → first = second
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.run_deterministic

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {S : CT3.Spec P} {C : CT3.Capability S} {input : CT3.Input S}
  (result : CT3.ExecutionResult S C input),
  result.terminal = CT3.Graph.Terminal.compression ∨
    result.terminal = CT3.Graph.Terminal.distinguishing ∨
      result.terminal = CT3.Graph.Terminal.knownRow ∨ result.terminal = CT3.Graph.Terminal.novelRow
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.outcome_exhaustive

apiDeclarations.type: Core.CapabilityContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.capabilityContract

apiDeclarations.type: List Core.NodeAutomationContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.nodeAutomationContracts

apiDeclarations.type: List Core.ResidualKindContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.residualKindContracts

presentation.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered enumeration of all known response rows.

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT3.Spec P} → CT3.Capability S → FinEnum S.Row
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Capability.rows

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable evidence deciding whether a candidate is admissible.
presentation.label: Admissibility decision procedure

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT3.Spec P} →
    CT3.Capability S →
      (G : P.Ambient) → (source : S.Piece) → (candidate : S.Candidate) → Decidable (S.Admissible G source candidate)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Capability.admissibleDecidable

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable evidence deciding whether a candidate is strictly smaller.
presentation.label: Decrease decision procedure

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT3.Spec P} →
    CT3.Capability S →
      (G : P.Ambient) → (source : S.Piece) → (candidate : S.Candidate) → Decidable (S.Smaller G source candidate)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Capability.smallerDecidable

presentation.plainExplanation: The application-specific size measure used in CT3's complexity certificate.
presentation.label: Input size

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT3.Spec P} → CT3.Capability S → P.Ambient → ℕ
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Capability.inputSize

presentation.plainExplanation: The coefficient in the certified polynomial bound on CT3 checks.
presentation.label: Work coefficient

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT3.Spec P} → CT3.Capability S → ℕ
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Capability.workCoefficient

presentation.plainExplanation: The degree in the certified polynomial bound on CT3 checks.
presentation.label: Work degree

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT3.Spec P} → CT3.Capability S → ℕ
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Capability.workDegree

presentation.plainExplanation: A proof that the full context, candidate, and row schedule satisfies the declared bound.
presentation.label: Polynomial work bound

formalDeclaration.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {S : CT3.Spec P} (self : CT3.Capability S) (G : P.Ambient),
  CT3.localCheckBound self.contexts self.candidates self.rows ≤
    self.workCoefficient * (self.inputSize G + 1) ^ self.workDegree
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT3.Capability.workBound

presentation.plainExplanation: The union of the mapped atom-side and outside-context edge sets.
presentation.label: Literal graph gluing

formalDeclaration.type:
{T : Type u} →
  FinEnum T → Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.Piece T → Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.Context T → Graph.PackedFiniteObject
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.glue

presentation.plainExplanation: The normalized outside context owns no boundary--boundary edge; the atom side owns those edges.
presentation.label: Boundary-edge ownership

formalDeclaration.type:
∀ {T : Type u} (self : Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.Context T) (left right : T),
  ¬self.graph.Adj (Sum.inl left) (Sum.inl right)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.Context.noBoundaryEdge

presentation.plainExplanation: A graph isomorphism identifying the literal gluing with the selected ambient graph.
presentation.label: Graph reconstruction

formalDeclaration.type:
{input : Graph.PackedMinimumDegreeCycle.StaticInput} →
  {T : Type u} →
    {boundaries : FinEnum T} →
      {ctx : Core.MinimalCounterexampleContext input.problem input.Target} →
        (self : Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.MinimumDegreeCycleReplacement.ProperAtom input boundaries ctx) →
          (Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.glue boundaries self.source self.outside).object.graph ≃g ctx.G.object.graph
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.MinimumDegreeCycleReplacement.ProperAtom.reconstruct

presentation.plainExplanation: The literal atom-side graph is connected.
presentation.label: Connected atom

formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.MinimumDegreeCycleReplacement.ProperAtom.connected

presentation.plainExplanation: The reconstructed atom is a proper local support of the ambient graph.
presentation.label: Proper atom

formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.MinimumDegreeCycleReplacement.ProperAtom.proper

presentation.plainExplanation: The replacement and source lie in the same boundary-degree fibre.
presentation.label: Boundary-degree equality

formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.MinimumDegreeCycleReplacement.Compression.boundaryDegree_eq

presentation.plainExplanation: Every replacement target response in an outside context transports to the source; two-way equivalence is not assumed.
presentation.label: Obstruction inclusion

formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.MinimumDegreeCycleReplacement.Compression.obstructionIncluded

presentation.plainExplanation: The replacement piece alone contains no selected target cycle.
presentation.label: Internal target avoidance

formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.MinimumDegreeCycleReplacement.Compression.internalTargetFree

presentation.plainExplanation: Every internal replacement vertex meets the minimum-degree threshold.
presentation.label: Replacement internal degree

formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.MinimumDegreeCycleReplacement.Compression.internalBaseline

presentation.plainExplanation: Only the replacement piece is assumed smaller; whole-graph decrease is derived.
presentation.label: Local lexicographic decrease

formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Graph.PackedBoundariedGluing.MinimumDegreeCycleReplacement.Compression.locallySmaller
